message:
feat(hostcall): extract HostcallRequestQueue into dedicated module with crossbeam lock-free fast ring and loom tests

Extracts the two-tier HostcallRequestQueue from extensions_js.rs into a
new src/hostcall_queue.rs module, upgrading the fast-path lane from a
hand-rolled Vec<Option<T>> ring to crossbeam_queue::ArrayQueue for true
lock-free single-producer/single-consumer semantics. The overflow lane
remains a bounded VecDeque for backpressure when the fast ring saturates.

The queue now supports two reclamation modes via PI_HOSTCALL_QUEUE_RECLAIMER
environment variable:
- Ebr: epoch-based retirement bookkeeping for high-throughput scenarios
- SafeFallback: immediate drop on pop for environments where EBR
  overhead is undesirable

Makes HostcallRequestQueue generic over T (was previously hardcoded to
HostcallRequest), enabling reuse for different payload types.

extensions_js.rs: Removes the inline HostcallRequestQueue implementation
(~150 lines), importing from the new module instead. HostcallQueue type
alias updated to use the generic form.

Adds crossbeam-queue (0.3) as a runtime dependency and loom (0.7.2) as
a dev dependency. Includes two new test files:
- tests/hostcall_queue_ebr.rs: EBR-mode correctness tests
- tests/hostcall_queue_loom.rs: deterministic concurrency tests under
  loom's model checker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
